SEARCH
Package com.example.moogerscouncil

Class AppointmentRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository
public class AppointmentRepository extends Object
Repository for the Firestore 'appointments' collection. All reads and writes to appointment documents flow through this class.

The critical method is bookAppointment(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, com.example.moogerscouncil.TimeSlot, com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository.OnBookingCallback), which uses a Firestore transaction to atomically mark a slot as unavailable and create the appointment document — preventing double-booking under concurrent access.

  • Constructor Details

    • AppointmentRepository

      public AppointmentRepository()
      Initialises the repository with a reference to the 'appointments' collection.

  • Method Details

    • bookAppointment

      public void bookAppointment(String studentId, String counselorId, TimeSlot slot, AppointmentRepository.OnBookingCallback callback)
      Atomically books a time slot for a student.

      Runs a Firestore transaction that:

      1. Reads the slot document to verify it is still available.
      2. Sets slot.available = false.
      3. Creates a new appointment document with status "CONFIRMED".
      If the slot was already taken, the transaction aborts and AppointmentRepository.OnBookingCallback.onSlotTaken() is called instead of AppointmentRepository.OnBookingCallback.onFailure(Exception).

      Parameters:
      studentId - The booking student's UID.
      counselorId - The counselor being booked.
      slot - The TimeSlot to book (must have a valid ID).
      callback - Three-way callback: success, slot-taken, or general failure.

    • updateAppointmentStatus

      public void updateAppointmentStatus(String appointmentId, String newStatus, AppointmentRepository.OnStatusUpdateCallback callback)
      Updates the status of an existing appointment. Used for marking appointments as COMPLETED, CANCELLED, or NO_SHOW.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - The Firestore document ID.
      newStatus - The new status string (e.g. "NO_SHOW", "COMPLETED").
      callback - Success/failure callback.

    • cancelAppointment

      public void cancelAppointment(String appointmentId, String slotId, AppointmentRepository.OnStatusUpdateCallback callback)
      Cancels an appointment by setting its status to CANCELLED and restoring the linked slot's availability so another student can book it.

      The slot restore is best-effort — if the slot document does not exist (e.g. demo data) the appointment is still marked CANCELLED and AppointmentRepository.OnStatusUpdateCallback.onSuccess() is called.

      Parameters:
      appointmentId - The Firestore document ID of the appointment.
      slotId - The Firestore document ID of the linked slot.
      callback - Success/failure callback.

    • getAppointmentsForCounselor

      public void getAppointmentsForCounselor(String counselorId, AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback callback)
      Fetches all appointments for a given counselor, ordered by date ascending. Used by CounselorDashboardActivity for the tabbed appointment view.
      Parameters:
      counselorId - The counselor's UID.
      callback - Receives the appointment list on success.

    • getAppointmentsForStudent

      public void getAppointmentsForStudent(String studentId, AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback callback)
      Fetches all appointments for a given student, ordered by date ascending. Used by HistoryActivity.
      Parameters:
      studentId - The student's UID.
      callback - Receives the appointment list on success.

    • getAppointmentsForStudentOnDate

      public void getAppointmentsForStudentOnDate(String studentId, String date, AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback callback)
      Fetches appointments for a student on a specific date. Used by CalendarActivity when a date is tapped.
      Parameters:
      studentId - The student's UID.
      date - Date in "yyyy-MM-dd" format.
      callback - Receives the matching appointments on success.

    • getCompletedAppointmentsNeedingFeedback

      public void getCompletedAppointmentsNeedingFeedback(String studentId, AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback callback)
      Fetches completed appointments for a student that don't yet have feedback submitted. Filters by status in memory after a single studentId query — avoids requiring a composite Firestore index.
